#    uv export --format requirements.txt --no-hashes --no-annotate -o requirements.txt
pyqt5==5.15.11

# The following dependencies provide the Qt5 runtime for PyQt5.
# Windows AMD64 uses pyqt5-qt5 5.15.2; other platforms use pyqt5-qt5 5.15.18.
pyqt5-qt5==5.15.2 ; platform_machine == 'AMD64' and sys_platform == 'win32'
pyqt5-qt5==5.15.18 ; platform_machine != 'AMD64' or sys_platform != 'win32'

pyqt5-sip==12.18.0
